iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 47% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 24 Hour 03 UTC. CRITICAL (stable). Natanz + Bushehr + Dimona/Arad struck (prior). IAEA: no radiation. Nuclear tit-for-tat in pause as conventional war dominates. Trump ultimatum to hit power plants raises nuclear escalation risk. Updated 2026-03-23T03:04:00Z

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 20 auto - % (up). Day 24 Hour 03 UTC. IMMINENT (up). UAE air defences actively responding to NEW Iranian missile threat (06:59 local). Indian national injured by debris in Abu Dhabi. Trump to Channel 13: ultimatum result "very good" - possible face-saving signal. Araghchi softens: Hormuz "not closed" (insurers self-restricting). Iraq pro-Iran group extends embassy attack pause. Countdown: ~20hrs to ultimatum deadline (23:44 GMT Mon). Brent $114+. Asian markets plunging. Updated 2026-03-23T03:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: UAE air defences responding to ACTIVE Iranian missile threat
latest_news.text: UAE air defense systems actively responding to incoming Iranian missile threat. Citizens told to shelter. Fresh attack as ultimatum deadline approaches.

latest_news.headline: Indian national injured by missile debris in Abu Dhabi
latest_news.source: Gulf News / Abu Dhabi Media Office
latest_news.text: Indian national sustained minor injuries from falling debris in Al Shawamekh area after air defences intercepted ballistic missile. Debris landed in residential area.

latest_news.headline: Trump says ultimatum result will be 'very good' - tells Israel's Channel 13
latest_news.text: Trump tells Israel's Channel 13 that Iran will 'soon find out' about the 48-hour deadline, says result will be 'very good' - suggesting possible diplomatic off-ramp rather than immediate strikes.

latest_news.headline: Iran FM Araghchi: 'Strait of Hormuz is not closed'
latest_news.text: Iran FM Araghchi says Hormuz is NOT formally closed - ships hesitate due to insurer fears. 'Freedom of Navigation cannot exist without Freedom of Trade. Respect both - or expect neither.' Softer framing than IRGC 'complete closure' threats.

iran_conventional.syria_escalation_note: Monitoring. Israel strikes in Sweida province Syria continue. Potential for separate tracker if escalation widens.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 60% (up). Day 20 auto - % (up). Day 24 Hour 03 UTC. IMMINENT (up). IDF Chief: operation "only just begun" and will be "prolonged." Katz orders intensified bridge/home demolitions in south Lebanon - Qasmiyeh Bridge destroyed. Aoun: "prelude to ground invasion." 7 IDF soldiers wounded by mortar. 1,029+ killed in Lebanon. Cluster bomb fragments in central Israel. No ceasefire prospects. Updated 2026-03-23T03:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel orders military to intensify demolitions of bridges + homes in southern Lebanon
latest_news.text: Defense Minister Katz orders IDF to step up destruction of bridges and demolish homes in frontline villages in southern Lebanon. Aoun calls it 'prelude to ground invasion.' Katz: operations will continue until threats to Israeli communities eliminated.

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut - 7 neighborhoods evacuated
latest_news.text: Israeli military strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut early Saturday. Evacuation warnings for 7 neighborhoods in southern suburbs. Jets bombed Beirut at 3am. Ghandouriyeh house strike kills 1, wounds 2.

latest_news.headline: WaPo: Israel strikes Hezbollah health center, kills 12 medical workers
latest_news.text: Israeli strike hit Hezbollah-run health center in southern Lebanon, killed 12 medical workers. Israel widens campaign beyond fighters to civilian infrastructure.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 24 Hour 03 UTC. DETERRENT (stable). 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkey. NATO air defences active. 22 nations signed Hormuz initiative (NATO SecGen Rutte). No Turkey-specific escalation. Updated 2026-03-23T03:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

india.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 3% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 24 Hour 03 UTC. DETERRENT (stable). No new developments. Updated 2026-03-23T03:04:00Z

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 33% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 24 Hour 03 UTC. CRITICAL (stable). ISW: Russia intensifying mechanized assaults, spring-summer offensive prep. Peace talks paused due to Iran war. Deadliest day 2026 recorded (1,610 KIA). Oil shock boosts Russian revenue. Updated 2026-03-23T03:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: ISW: Russia intensifying mechanized assaults — spring-summer offensive prep
latest_news.text: ISW assessment: Russian forces increasingly conducting mechanized assaults on frontline, possibly part of intensified preparation for Spring-Summer 2026 offensive.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 29% (up). Day 20 auto - % (up). Day 24 Hour 03 UTC. ELEVATED (up). Eid ceasefire through Mar 24 but massively violated. TTP-linked militants kill 3 police in KP. Guardian: families search for loved ones after Kabul hospital strike (400+ killed). ICG warns "deadly violence likely without dialogue." Post-Eid resumption of full fighting near-certain. Updated 2026-03-23T03:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Eid ceasefire breaches mount: Mortar fire in Kunar/Paktika, 1 killed
latest_news.text: Taliban accuses Pakistan of firing mortars in Kunar and Paktika during Eid ceasefire - 1 civilian killed. Taliban chief of staff calls it 'deception.' ICG warns 'deadly violence likely without dialogue.' Ceasefire technically holds through Mar 24 midnight but fraying badly. Multiple breach reports.

top_signals: TRUMP 48HR ULTIMATUM: ~18hrs to deadline (23:44 GMT Mon) — Bessent: 'escalate to de-escalate'
FRESH TEHRAN STRIKES: Israel launches 'extensive strikes' on Tehran infrastructure early Monday — 3rd wave on capital
IEA CRISIS: 11M bpd lost — worse than 1973+1979 oil crises COMBINED + Ukraine gas crisis doubled
MARKET CRASH: Seoul -6%, Tokyo -5%, HK -3% — South Korean won weakest since 2009
UAE ACTIVE DEFENCE: Air defences intercepting Iranian missile threats this morning
ARAGHCHI SOFTENS: 'Hormuz not closed, insurers self-restricting' — possible diplomatic off-ramp
IAEA GROSSI: Hopes to 're-establish' Iran-US nuclear talks — only diplomatic channel
IDF CHIEF: Lebanon operation 'only just begun' — will be 'prolonged'
LEBANON: 118 children, 79 women among 1,024+ killed — Katz orders bridge demolitions
OIL: Brent $112+, WTI near $100 — Asian markets in freefall
PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN: Eid ceasefire through Mar 24 but TTP kills 3 police — post-Eid violence near-certain
2,000+ DEAD across region — war enters FOURTH week

new: Israel launches fresh extensive strikes on Tehran infrastructure (early Mon 03:33 CET)
IEA chief: 11M bpd lost — worst energy crisis in modern history
Asian markets crash: Seoul -6%, Tokyo -5%, HK -3%, won weakest since 2009
Bessent: 'escalate to de-escalate' — confirms US seeking supplemental war funding
IAEA Grossi pursuing diplomatic re-engagement on Iran nuclear talks

latest_news.headline: Israel launches NEW WAVE of 'extensive strikes' on Tehran infrastructure
latest_news.text: Israeli military announces 'extensive strikes' on Tehran targeting Iranian regime infrastructure. Fresh wave early Monday as ultimatum deadline approaches (~18hrs). Smoke reported over Tehran.

latest_news.headline: IEA chief: Iran war energy crunch WORSE than 1970s oil crises and Ukraine combined
latest_news.text: IEA head Birol: World lost 11M bpd (more than 1973+1979 crises combined = 10M bpd). Gas losses 140BCM vs 75BCM in Ukraine crisis. 'Two oil crises and one gas crash put all together.' Petrolchemicals and fertilizers severely impacted.

latest_news.headline: Asian stock markets crash — Seoul -6%, Tokyo -5%, HK -3%
latest_news.text: Seoul sheds 6%, Tokyo 5%, HK 3%, Shanghai/Taipei/Manila all -2%+. South Korean won hits weakest since 2009 (1,510/$). Brent $112, WTI near $100. Global market panic as ultimatum deadline looms.

latest_news.headline: IAEA chief Grossi hopes to 're-establish' Iran-US nuclear talks
latest_news.text: IAEA Director General Grossi tells CBS he's had 'important conversations' at White House and with Iran: 'We hope to re-establish that line' on nuclear program talks. Only diplomatic off-ramp for nuclear track.

latest_news.headline: Bessent: 'Sometimes you have to escalate to de-escalate'
latest_news.text: Treasury Secretary Bessent on whether Trump winding down or escalating: 'They are not mutually exclusive. Sometimes you have to escalate to de-escalate.' US has 'plenty of money' but seeks supplemental funding.

outlook: IMMINENT (Day 24, 04:04 UTC). TRUMP ULTIMATUM ~18hrs to deadline (23:44 GMT Mon). Israel launches FRESH WAVE of extensive strikes on Tehran infrastructure. IEA confirms worst energy crisis in modern history — 11M bpd lost. Asian markets crashing. Brent $112+. Bessent: 'escalate to de-escalate.' Grossi pursuing IAEA diplomatic channel. Araghchi softens Hormuz language. 22 nations mobilizing for Hormuz. IDF intensifies Lebanon operations. Pakistan ceasefire dead. 2,000+ dead. Countdown to ultimatum deadline tonight — watch for US action or diplomatic off-ramp.
de_escalation_watch: Day 24 Hour 04 UTC. DE-ESCALATION: Araghchi softens Hormuz language (not formally closed). IAEA Grossi pursuing diplomatic channel with Iran-US. Trump hints result will be 'very good' — possible face-saving off-ramp. ESCALATION: Israel launches FRESH 'extensive strikes' on Tehran infrastructure. IEA confirms worst energy crisis since 1970s (worse than 1973+1979 combined). Asian markets crashing (Seoul -6%, Tokyo -5%). Bessent 'escalate to de-escalate' rhetoric. UAE intercepting active Iranian missile threats. Ultimatum ~18hrs away. Post-Eid Pakistan violence certain. NET: Net escalation toward ultimatum deadline. Fresh Tehran strikes + market crash outweigh weak diplomatic signals.
